# theorem monorepo (Full AI Context)

## Repository Intent

theorem monorepo is a modular monorepo designed for AI-assisted development with strict package boundaries and explicit public APIs.

## Required Operating Pattern for Agents

1. Identify the target package from `/docs/ai/module-index.md` before editing code.
2. Restrict imports to package entrypoints rather than deep relative paths.
3. Prefer local package checks first, then run repository checks.
4. Update generated docs after API changes (`pnpm docs:build`).

## Package Overview

### @theorem/core
- Path: `/packages/core`
- Public entry: `/packages/core/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Shared workspace package.
- Internal deps: _none_

### @theorem/feature-academic
- Path: `/packages/features/academic`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/academic/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`

### @theorem/feature-feeds
- Path: `/packages/features/feeds`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/feeds/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-learning
- Path: `/packages/features/learning`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/learning/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-library
- Path: `/packages/features/library`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/library/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-reader
- Path: `/packages/features/reader`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/reader/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/feature-learning`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-settings
- Path: `/packages/features/settings`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/settings/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-statistics
- Path: `/packages/features/statistics`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/statistics/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/feature-vocabulary
- Path: `/packages/features/vocabulary`
- Public entry: `/packages/features/vocabulary/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Feature package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/ui`

### @theorem/ui
- Path: `/packages/ui`
- Public entry: `/packages/ui/src/index.ts`
- Purpose: Shared workspace package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`

### @theorem/web
- Path: `/apps/web`
- Public entry: `/n/a`
- Purpose: Application package.
- Internal deps: `@theorem/core`, `@theorem/feature-academic`, `@theorem/feature-feeds`, `@theorem/feature-learning`, `@theorem/feature-library`, `@theorem/feature-reader`, `@theorem/feature-settings`, `@theorem/feature-statistics`, `@theorem/feature-vocabulary`, `@theorem/ui`

- `/AGENTS.md`
- `/README.md`
- `/docs/monorepo-guide.md`
- `/docs/ai/module-index.md`
- `/docs/api/README.md`
